subtitle.ja: 左手の親指と小指に糸をかけて始めます。左手小指の向こう側の糸を、右手親指と小指で取ります
subtitle.en: Begin with the string on the left thumb and little finger. With the right thumb and little finger, pick up the far left little-finger string.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指で、反対の手のひらの糸を取り合います
subtitle.en: With both middle fingers, pick up each other’s palm strings.

subtitle.ja: 両手の親指の糸を外します
左右の人差し指で、反対の手の中指手前の糸を取り合います
subtitle.en: With both index fingers, pick up each other’s near middle-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指と中指の糸を越えて小指手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, move over the index- and middle-finger strings and pick up from below the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指と中指で、反対の手のひらの糸を取り合います
subtitle.en: With both index and middle fingers, pick up each other’s palm strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の糸を、反対側の手で持って親指から糸を外し、半回転させてねじれを無くし、元の親指に戻します
subtitle.en: With the opposite hand, take each thumb string, remove it from the thumb, turn it halfway to remove the twist, and return it to the original thumb.

subtitle.ja: 同様に、左右の中指の糸を、反対側の手で持って中指から糸を外し、半回転させてねじれを無くし、元の中指に戻します
subtitle.en: In the same way, with the opposite hand take each middle-finger string, remove it from the middle finger, turn it halfway to remove the twist, and return it to the original middle finger.

subtitle.ja: 同様に、左右の小指の糸を、反対側の手で持って小指から糸を外し、半回転させてねじれを無くし、元の小指に戻して完成です
subtitle.en: In the same way, with the opposite hand take each little-finger string, remove it from the little finger, turn it halfway to remove the twist, return it to the original little finger, and show the finished figure.
